dimensions.name: AuthN / AuthZ
dimensions.desc: Whether endpoints authenticate and permissions are least-privilege

dimensions.name: Prompt injection / tool poisoning
dimensions.desc: Whether tool descriptions / skills carry manipulable instruction patterns

dimensions.name: Supply chain
dimensions.desc: Source and version of skills / servers, and known-CVE hits

dimensions.name: Action risk / human approval
dimensions.desc: Whether destructive / outbound actions require human approval

dimensions.name: Cost & audit
dimensions.desc: Rate / cost limits and audit trail

findings.text: Unauthenticated remote MCP server (public-gateway): This server is remote but has no auth header or key, so anyone could connect and drive it. [2025 多起未驗證 MCP 端點曝險事件]
Auto-approves destructive / outbound actions (payments): Configured to auto-approve delete / payment / send actions with no human in the loop. [human-in-the-loop]
Uses a package version matching a known CVE (legacy-remote): The package version this server launches matches a known vulnerability in the built-in CVE snapshot. [CVE 快照]
Over-broad token / environment variable (payments): Detected admin / root / wildcard-style credentials, violating least privilege. [最小權限 (least privilege)]

Tool description contains suspicious instruction patterns (possible tool poisoning) (legacy-remote): The tool description hides phrases like "ignore previous instructions" that can manipulate the model when read. [工具投毒 tool poisoning]
Missing rate / cost limit (public-gateway): No rate or cost limit set; loops or abuse can run up uncontrolled cost. [成本治理]
Unpinned install source (payments): Installs via @latest or curl | sh, with no guarantee of content or supply-chain integrity. [供應鏈完整性]
Missing rate / cost limit (payments): No rate or cost limit set; loops or abuse can run up uncontrolled cost. [成本治理]
Missing rate / cost limit (legacy-remote): No rate or cost limit set; loops or abuse can run up uncontrolled cost. [成本治理]
Missing audit trail (public-gateway): No logging / audit configured, making incidents hard to trace afterward. [稽核軌跡]
Missing audit trail (payments): No logging / audit configured, making incidents hard to trace afterward. [稽核軌跡]
Missing audit trail (legacy-remote): No logging / audit configured, making incidents hard to trace afterward. [稽核軌跡]

cta.title: Next step: connect your agent to your systems safely
cta.body: Your agent security is Red, with critical holes detected. In regulated industries these can mean compliance violations and data leaks. Connecting agents safely needs least-privilege, audit trails and local compliance architecture, which is Peakstar's governance and integration work.

findings.ref: 2025 多起未驗證 MCP 端點曝險事件
